predecessor.binding: one selected candidate materialized as an isolated verification snapshot

successor_evidence_surface.binding: compatible sealed evidence projection without successor authority

admission: supported Candidate Patch receipt with exact digest
supported isolated application receipt with exact digest
exact candidate artifact repository commit and snapshot correspondence
sealed verification plan with allowed check identifiers and executable prefixes
bounded command timeout output and repository snapshot policy
network secrets live repository and Git denied by policy
owned: per-check exit stdout stderr timeout exception and duration evidence
bounded output excerpts and exact output digests
Independent Verification v0.1 compatible evidence projection
not_owned: live patch application or live filesystem mutation
Git index tree ref branch commit push pull request or merge
preserved_invariants: verification evidence is not merge authority
verification execution does not apply a live patch
verification execution has no Git effect
verification execution has no deployment authority
verification execution has no secret authority
verification execution grants no successor authority
